payload.answer: The new claim that Sam from Goldman has no children conflicts with the existing memory that Sam from Goldman has two children. Do not overwrite or present either as current without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement directly contradicts the existing memory about Sam from Goldman, and the available context is insufficient to determine whether this is the same Sam, a correction, a temporal change, or an ambiguity involving different people.

details: Detected direct contradiction between existing and new child-count claims.
No durable memory committed because the conflict is unresolved.
Preserved ambiguity and avoided presenting superseded or contradicted facts as current.

repair_options: Ask whether the new statement is intended to correct the existing memory about the same Sam from Goldman.
Ask whether there may be multiple people named Sam associated with Goldman.
Ask whether the child-count information changed over time or whether one of the statements was inaccurate.
If confirmed as a correction, mark the prior memory as superseded/deleted and store: Sam from Goldman has no children.
If not confirmed, retain the conflict as unresolved and avoid using either child-count claim as a current fact.
